nodes.name: Ceyx
nodes.summary: Ceyx（Ceyx）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联22种鸟类，如Azure kingfisher、Bismarck kingfisher、Indigo-banded kingfisher等22种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bismarck kingfisher
nodes.summary: The Bismarck kingfisher (Ceyx websteri) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae that is endemic to Papua New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, rivers, freshwater lakes, and freshwater marshes. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
